name: Toffee
recipeInstructions:
1. Have baking soda ready at the stove to add at once.
2. Stirring constantly between 236°F and 290°F prevents butter from separating.
3. Melt butters slowly; add sugar, water, and salt.
4. Cook at low heat, stirring constantly until it reaches 212°F.
5. Stop stirring until candy reaches 236°F.
6. Add the walnuts and stir constantly until candy reaches 290°F.
7. Remove from heat and add baking soda, stirring well.
8. Pour onto a buttered cookie sheet.
9. Immediately cut into squares. They will run together but can be cracked where cut.
10. Add dipping chocolate wafers on top. They will melt and you can spread them out.
11. Sprinkle nuts on top (optional).
